name: Persian Coins
description: These gold coins, known as Darics, were minted by the Achaemenid Empire and featured the distinct image of a kneeling archer to standardize trade across the ancient world.

name: Greek Goetia
description: Historically referring to ancient low magic, this practice involves the invocation of spirits and is best known today through the demonological spells of the Lesser Key of Solomon.

name: Flooki's Compass
description: Popularized by the character Floki in the series Vikings, this primitive navigation tool uses a translucent sunstone to reveal the sun's position through thick clouds for ocean travel.

name: Henry Dawson
description: This refers to a prized 19th-century oil painting by British artist Henry Dawson, renowned for his atmospheric marine scenes and vibrant landscapes.
